verses.latin_vulgate: In finem. Psalmus David.   Dixit insipiens in corde suo : Non est Deus.  Corrupti sunt, et abominabiles facti sunt in studiis suis ;  non est qui faciat bonum, non est usque ad unum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַמְנַצֵּ֗חַ לְדָ֫וִ֥ד אָ֘מַ֤ר נָבָ֣ל בְּ֭לִבּוֹ אֵ֣ין אֱלֹהִ֑ים הִֽשְׁחִ֗יתוּ הִֽתְעִ֥יבוּ עֲלִילָ֗ה אֵ֣ין עֹֽשֵׂה־טֽוֹב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Unto the end, a psalm for David. The fool hath said in his heart: There is no God. They are corrupt, and are become abominable in their ways: there is none that doth good, no not one.
verses.finnish_biblia: Davidin Psalmi, edelläveisaajalle. Tyhmät sanovat sydämessänsä: ei Jumalaa olekaan; ei he mitään kelpaa, ja ovat ilkiät menoissansa; ei ole joka hyvää tekee.
verses.king_james: The fool hath said in his heart, There is no God. They are corrupt, they have done abominable works, there is none that doeth good.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus de cælo prospexit super filios hominum,  ut videat si est intelligens, aut requirens Deum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְֽהֹוָ֗ה מִשָּׁמַיִם֮ הִשְׁקִ֢יף עַֽל־בְּנֵי־אָ֫דָ֥ם לִ֭רְאוֹת הֲיֵ֣שׁ מַשְׂכִּ֑יל דֹּ֝רֵ֗שׁ אֶת־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord hath looked down from heaven upon the children of men, to see if there be any that understand and seek God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra katsoi taivaasta ihmisten lapsia, nähdäksensä, jos joku ymmärtäis eli etsis Jumalaa.
verses.king_james: The Lord looked down from heaven upon the children of men, to see if there were any that did understand, and seek God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes declinaverunt, simul inutiles facti sunt.  Non est qui faciat bonum, non est usque ad unum.  Sepulchrum patens est guttur eorum ;  linguis suis dolose agebant.  Venenum aspidum sub labiis eorum,  quorum os maledictione et amaritudine plenum est ;  veloces pedes eorum ad effundendum sanguinem.  Contritio et infelicitas in viis eorum,  et viam pacis non cognoverunt ;  non est timor Dei ante oculos eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַכֹּ֥ל סָר֮ יַחְדָּ֢ו נֶ֫אֱלָ֥חוּ אֵ֤ין עֹֽשֵׂה־ט֑וֹב אֵ֝֗ין גַּם־אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: They are all gone aside, they are become unprofitable together: there is none that doth good: no not one. Their throat is an open sepulchre; with their tongues they acted deceitfully: the poison of asps is under their lips. Their mouth is full of cursing and bitterness; their feet are swift to shed blood. Destruction and unhappiness in their ways; and the way of peace they have not known: there is no fear of God before their eyes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta he ovat kaikki poikenneet pois, ja kaikki ovat kelvottomat: ei ole yksikään, joka hyvää tekee, ei ainoakaan.
verses.king_james: They are all gone aside, they are all together become filthy: there is none that doeth good, no, not one.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonne cognoscent omnes qui operantur iniquitatem,  qui devorant plebem meam sicut escam panis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹ֥א יָדְעוּ֮ כׇּל־פֹּ֢עֲלֵ֫י אָ֥וֶן אֹכְלֵ֣י עַ֭מִּי אָ֣כְלוּ לֶ֑חֶם יְ֝הֹוָ֗ה לֹ֣א קָרָֽאוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Shall not all they know that work iniquity, who devour my people as they eat bread?
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikö siis kenkään pahointekiöistä sitä havaitse? jotka minun kansaani syövät niinkuin he söisivät leipää; vaan ei he rukoile Herraa.
verses.king_james: Have all the workers of iniquity no knowledge? who eat up my people as they eat bread, and call not upon the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominum non invocaverunt ;  illic trepidaverunt timore, ubi non erat timor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שָׁ֤ם ׀ פָּ֣חֲדוּ פָ֑חַד כִּֽי־אֱ֝לֹהִ֗ים בְּד֣וֹר צַדִּֽיק׃
verses.douay_rheims: They have not called upon the Lord: there have they trembled for fear, where there was no fear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Siellä he kovin pelkäsivät; sillä Jumala on läsnä vanhurskasten sukua.
verses.king_james: There were they in great fear: for God is in the generation of the righteous.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam Dominus in generatione justa est :  consilium inopis confudistis,  quoniam Dominus spes ejus est.
verses.douay_rheims: For the Lord is in the just generation: you have confounded the counsel of the poor man; but the Lord is his hope.
verses.finnish_biblia: Te häpäisette köyhän neuvon; mutta Jumala on hänen turvansa.
verses.king_james: Ye have shamed the counsel of the poor, because the Lord is his refuge.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis dabit ex Sion salutare Israël ?  Cum averterit Dominus captivitatem plebis suæ,  exsultabit Jacob, et lætabitur Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִ֥י־יִתֵּ֣ן מִצִּיּוֹן֮ יְשׁוּעַ֢ת יִשְׂרָ֫אֵ֥ל בְּשׁ֣וּב יְ֭הֹוָה שְׁב֣וּת עַמּ֑וֹ יָגֵ֥ל יַ֝עֲקֹ֗ב יִשְׂמַ֥ח יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Who shall give out of Sion the salvation of Israel? when the Lord shall have turned away the captivity of his people, Jacob shall rejoice, and Israel shall be glad.
verses.finnish_biblia: Oi jos apu tulis Israelille Zionista! sillä koska Herra päästää vangitun kansansa, niin Jakob iloitsee ja Israel riemuitsee.
verses.king_james: Oh that the salvation of Israel were come out of Zion! when the Lord bringeth back the captivity of his people, Jacob shall rejoice, and Israel shall be glad.
